title: helianthus cirrhoides
intro: Helianthus cirrhoides, also known as the rough-stemmed sunflower, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its hairy stems and bright yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helianthus cirrhoides include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
